pipeline_components.architect: EdogQaLlmClient.ArchitectOnceAsync (gpt-5.4, high reasoning, strict json_schema, T2 prompt: GRANULARITY RULE + ANTI-QUOTA GUARD + PR-TYPE CATEGORY HEURISTIC + CATEGORY PRECEDENCE + CONTRACT-BEARING COMMENTS; ArchitectMaxOutputTokens=96000)
pipeline_components.editor: EdogQaLlmClient.EditorOnceAsync (gpt-5.4-mini, low reasoning, strict json_schema, T2 prompt: STRICT 1:1 SKETCH-TO-SCENARIO MAPPING + ARCHITECT-LABEL PRESERVATION + CATEGORY SELECTION GUIDE; EditorMaxOutputTokens=32000)
pipeline_components.scorer: tests/qa-eval/score_eval.py --span-expansion 15 --matcher bipartite (T1j: global bipartite matching + hunk-bounded forward expansion N=15)

notes: T2 (Architect+Editor prompt tuning + chronic-density budget bump). Lifts n=6 macro_recall 0.391 -> 0.577 (+47%% relative, +0.186 absolute) and macro_precision_highest 0.451 -> 0.502 (+11%%) without touching the scorer. Per-PR: PR-955910 0.250 -> 0.333 (+0.083), PR-960543 0.182 -> 0.364 (+0.182), PR-966141 0.000 -> 0.750 (+0.750, Editor granularity fix), PR-975848 0.750 (flat), PR-976609 0.667 (flat), PR-977882 0.500 -> 0.600 (+0.100). Two heads of the lift: (1) prompt structure — GRANULARITY RULE + ANTI-QUOTA GUARD + PR-TYPE CATEGORY HEURISTIC + CATEGORY PRECEDENCE + CONTRACT-BEARING COMMENTS on Architect; STRICT 1:1 SKETCH-TO-SCENARIO MAPPING + ARCHITECT-LABEL PRESERVATION + CATEGORY SELECTION GUIDE on Editor; (2) budget bump — ArchitectMaxOutputTokens 65536 -> 96000 unblocked PR-975848 and PR-977882 which under T2 prompts chronically exhausted 65K (status=incomplete, 0 output tokens after ~250s of reasoning), EditorMaxOutputTokens 16384 -> 32000 to accommodate 10-sketch dense scenarios from the deeper Architect plan. PR-977882 architect capture remains variance-prone at 96K (one ARCHITECT_FAILED of 2 attempts in this capture pass before succeeding) — if future capture rate degrades, bump to 128K. T2.1 hotfix attempt (PARALLEL-SIBLING COMPRESSION + 4th Regression trigger) was REVERTED in-session after measuring macro 0.451 (down from T2 0.473 baseline read on partially-stale captures) — compression over-fired on diverse-touchpoint PRs (PR-976609 9 sketches -> 4, broke 0.667 to 0.333). Lesson: procedural compression rules can't reliably distinguish 'siblings that revert together' from 'distinct scenarios that share evidence shape'. That's the structural argument for T3 FLT-priors slice (descriptive domain knowledge > prescriptive prompt rules). Remaining headroom toward spec's nominal 0.80 macro recall: PR-955910 and PR-960543 anchor-precision misses likely live in FLT-knowledge gaps the prompt can't encode (the Scriban-template + Fabric-notebook stack for PR-955910, and the catalog/dag/dqreport throw-site cluster for PR-960543). T3 will encode these as a frozen prefix block (~5K tokens of FLT priors + idiom fingerprints + few-shot exemplars from non-corpus PRs). Floors recalibrated to ~78%% of measured (corpus 0.45/0.39/0.45) — see score_floors.json schema 1.7. See score_report.json (immutable, schema 1.3).

errors: Architect chronically exhausted 65K budget at T2 prompt density — required ArchitectMaxOutputTokens=96000 bump to capture.
Architect capture variance-prone at 96K (one ARCHITECT_FAILED in 2 attempts before succeeding). Editor required EditorMaxOutputTokens=32000 bump to fit 10-sketch dense scenario set.
